description: Schema for result JSON generated by the experiment runner for textual (LLM-judged) tasks. One file per (task, experiment, role, model); all repetitions are stored in the top-level 'repetitions' array.
structure: run_config fields at top level + 'repetitions' array (one entry per repetition)

run_config.description: Identifies what ran: task, setup, role, model. Common across all repetitions — stored once at the top level of the file.

task_id.description: Task identifier parsed from docs/tasks/<task>.md metadata.

task_type.description: Task type parsed from metadata (expected: textual).

agent_role.description: Role used for the run (expert or beginner).

model.description: LLM model used for agent calls.

judge_model.description: LLM model used as judge (resolved from config at save time).

temperature.description: Generation temperature used for both agent and judge calls (from config.TEMPERATURE).

is_hosted.description: True if the model was called via a hosted API (Ollama Cloud, Google), False for local Ollama. Reflected in the filename prefix hosted_.

task_path.description: Filesystem path to the task markdown used for this run.

sol_path.description: Filesystem path to the solution markdown with rubric JSON.

repetitions.description: Array of per-repetition results. Each entry contains timing, agent outputs, judge evaluation, and resource usage.

timing.description: Wall-clock timestamps and elapsed duration for the full repetition.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the repetition started.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the repetition finished.

elapsed_seconds.description: Wall-clock elapsed seconds for the repetition.

agent.description: Agent outputs: all attempts in history, then the final selected answer.

attempts.description: Number of LLM calls within the repetition (1 = no retry needed).

history.description: Per-attempt records. Each entry: answer, reasoning, confidence, elapsed_seconds (agent call wall-clock), tokens_in, tokens_out, prompt_system, prompt_user, judge_score (per-criterion breakdown with judge_elapsed_seconds), verdict.

final_answer.description: Clean 3-field subset of history[-1]: answer, reasoning, confidence. For quick access without traversing full history.

judge.description: Judge evaluation of the final answer against the rubric.

verdict.description: Correctness verdict: correct if normalized_score >= TEXTUAL_PASS_RATIO, else wrong.

judge_score.description: Per-criterion rubric scores plus derived summary fields.

*_score.description: Per-criterion score fields defined by the task rubric (names vary per task).

total_score.description: Sum of per-criterion scores; computed from rubric fields if missing.

normalized_score.description: total_score / rubric total_max — in [0, 1]; threshold is TEXTUAL_PASS_RATIO (0.7).

judge_elapsed_seconds.description: Wall-clock elapsed seconds for the judge call on the last attempt. Per-attempt judge elapsed is in history[n].judge_score.judge_elapsed_seconds.

resources.description: Token usage for the repetition (agent and judge calls separately).

tokens.description: Token counts from Ollama; null if the provider did not return them.

agent_in.description: Prompt tokens consumed by agent calls, aggregated across all retry attempts. Per-attempt value is in history[n].tokens_in.

agent_out.description: Completion tokens produced by agent calls, aggregated across all retry attempts. Per-attempt value is in history[n].tokens_out.

judge_in.description: Prompt tokens consumed by judge calls, aggregated across all retry attempts. Note: per-attempt judge tokens are not saved individually (only elapsed is, in history[n].judge_score.judge_elapsed_seconds).

judge_out.description: Completion tokens produced by judge calls, aggregated across all retry attempts.
